name: Symlink to passwd Created
notes:
This rule detects symlink created to /etc/passwd directory.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Symlink Etc Passwd
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious command lines that look as if they would create symbolic links to /etc/passwd


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches "Command" LIKE '%ln -s -f /etc/passwd%' OR "Command" LIKE '%ln -s /etc/passwd%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Symlink to passwd Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches "Command" LIKE '%ln -s -f /etc/passwd%' OR "Command" LIKE '%ln -s /etc/passwd%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Symlink to passwd Created
Event description: This rule detects symlink created to /etc/passwd directory.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
